Trigger.name: Add item
Trigger.script:
enableTrigger("Rents_item_name") enableTrigger("Rents_disable_item_name") rents.cost = f"{matches[2]} rent due"
if rents.clear_room then if rents.name then local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") local room if wotmudmapper then if table.size(wotmudmapper.currentID) == 1 then room = wotmudmapper.currentID[1] else room = 0 end else room = getPlayerRoom() end db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) ) rents.clear_room = false end end

regexCodeList.string: \d+ items? stored for \d+ days?, (.+) rent due\.

Trigger.name: Rents_item_name
Trigger.script:
rents.item = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
if not rents.name then rents:echo("\nUnable to store item to rent database. Type \"score\" to capture character name.\n", false, true) else local room = getPlayerRoom() local zone = getRoomUserData(room, "zone") db:add( rents_db.storage, { name = rents.name, room = room, zone = zone, item = rents.item, cost = rents.cost } ) end

Trigger.name: Empty rent
Trigger.script: if rents.name then local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") local room = getPlayerRoom() db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) ) end

regexCodeList.string: tells you, 'I don't have any items for you here\.'$

Trigger.name: Bank balance
Trigger.script:
local amount = tonumber(matches[3]) local coppers = amount%20 local crowns = (amount - coppers)/20
rents.cost = f"{crowns} gold crowns and {coppers} coppers"
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
if not rents.name then rents:echo("\nUnable to store item to rent database. Type \"score\" to capture character name.\n", false, true) else
db:delete( rents_db.storage, db:AND(db:eq(rents_db.storage.item, "bank balance"), db:eq(rents_db.storage.name, rents.name)) )
db:add( rents_db.storage, { name = rents.name, item = "bank balance", cost = rents.cost } ) end

regexCodeList.string: ^A (.+) whispers to you 'Your balance is the equivalent of (\d+) copper.'$

Alias.name: Show all rents
Alias.script:
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
local storage = db:fetch(rents_db.storage)
if table.is_empty(storage) then rents:echo("No items found in the rent database.\n", false, true) else rents:display_items(storage) end

Alias.name: Rents show name
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
local storage = db:fetch(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.name,name))
if table.is_empty(storage) then rents:echo(f"No items for the character \"{name}\" found in the rent database.\n", false, true) else rents:display_items(storage) end

Alias.name: Rents show item
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
local storage = {}
if name == "rare" then for _, rare in pairs(rents.rares) do storage = table.n_union(storage, db:fetch(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.item, f"%{rare}%"))) end elseif name == "angreal" then for _, angreal in pairs(rents.angreal) do storage = table.n_union(storage, db:fetch(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.item, f"%{angreal}%"))) end else storage = db:fetch(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.item, f"%{name}%")) end
if table.is_empty(storage) then rents:echo(f"No items containing the phrase \"{name}\" found in the rent database\n", false, true) else rents:display_items(storage) end

Alias.name: Rents show zone
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
local storage = db:fetch(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.zone, f"%{name}%"))
if table.is_empty(storage) then rents:echo(f"No items for zone \"{name}\" found in the rent database\n", false, true) else rents:display_items(storage) end

Alias.name: Rents delete
Alias.script:
--deletes the ENTIRE rents database
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") db:delete(rents_db.storage, true) rents:echo("The entire rents database has been deleted.\n")

Alias.name: Rents delete name
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
db:delete(rents_db.storage, db:like(rents_db.storage.name, name)) rents:echo("All items for character \""..name.."\" have been removed from the rent database.\n")

Alias.name: Rents delete room
Alias.script:
local room = getPlayerRoom()
if matches[2] then room = tonumber(matches[2]) end
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents")
db:delete(rents_db.storage, db:eq(rents_db.storage.room, room)) rents:echo(f"All items for room \"{getRoomName(room)}\" have been removed from the rent database.\n")

Script.name: rents initializations
Script.script:
db:create( "rents", { storage = { name = "", room = 0, zone = "", item = "", cost = "", timestamp = db:Timestamp("CURRENT_TIMESTAMP"), }, } )
rents = rents or {clear_room = true}
rents.help = [[ <cyan>Rent Script<reset>
This script will track items that you have stored in your rents in a database located at ]] .. getMudletHomeDir() .. [[/Database_rents.db
Below is a brief overview of some commands that this script includes. All commands can be found in the appropriate rents folder under mudlet aliases.
<cyan>Commands:<reset> <yellow>rents show<reset> - Show all items in the rent database <yellow>rents show name character<reset> - Shows all items in the rent database associated with a particular character name. Not case sensitive. Examples: rents show name Adael, rents show name bludlust <yellow>rents show item keyword(s)<reset> - Shows all items in the rent database that contain the given keyword(s). Not case sensitive, but if multiple keywords are used the order (and, if applicable, punctuation) matters. Examples: rents show item heron-engraved, rents show item a crystal lightstick <yellow>rents show item rare<reset> - Shows all rare items in the rent database <yellow>rents show item angreal<reset> - Shows all angreal in the rent database <yellow>rents show zone keyword(s)<reset> - Shows all items in the rent database whose zone name (in my map data) contains the provided keyword(s). Not case sensitive, but if multiple keywords are used the order (and, if applicable, punctuation) matters. Examples: rents show zone Caemlyn, rents show zone bandar eban, rents show zone thakan'dar
<yellow>rents delete<reset> - Delete the ENTIRE rent database. <red>Use with caution!<reset> <yellow>rents delete name character<reset> - Deletes all entries in the rent database for the provided character name. Not case sensitive. Examples: rents delete name Adael, rents delete name bludlust <yellow>rents delete room (roomID)<reset> - Deletes all entries in the rent database for the player's current room, or the provided roomID number if one is given. Examples: rents delete room, rents delete room 139
]]

Script.name: rents:echo
Script.script:
function rents:echo(what, debug, err) --colored tags for message echo local main_tag = "<lawn_green>(<green>rents<lawn_green>): <white>" local debug_tag = "<deep_sky_blue>(<royal_blue>debug<deep_sky_blue>): <white>" local err_tag = "<coral>(<red>error<coral>): <white>"
--if debug message and config debug is false, return without echoing if debug and not self.configs.dbug then return end
--if start of message is new line, print that before colored tags of message echo if what:sub(0,1)=="\n" then cecho("\n") what = what:sub(2) end cecho(main_tag) if debug then cecho(debug_tag) end if err then cecho(err_tag) end cecho(what) end

Script.name: rents:sys_disconnection
Script.script:
function rents:sys_disconnection(event) rents.name = nil rents.clear_room = true end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "rents:sys_disconnection") registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysDisconnectionEvent", "rents:sys_disconnection")

Script.name: rents rare items
Script.script: rents.rares = { "a heron-marked longsword", "a heron-mark blade", "a heron-marked greatsword", "a heron-marked foil", "a heron-engraved scabbard", "a belt bearing a dragon worked in silver", "a black shirt trimmed with lace", "an ornate chainmail shirt chased with gold", "a sinister black trident", "a massive war maul", "a tainted war maul", "a triple bladed dagger", "a steel warhammer", "a surcoat with exquisite embroidery", "a gown of exquisite design", "a silver medallion", "a shocklance", "a razor-sharp longsword", "a partisan bearing the arms of Ghealdan", "a pair of long-handled war axes", "a pair of gold-hilted hooked swords", "a nimble blade with a cuendillar pommel", "a feathered Kandori paramerion", "a diamond-tipped lance", "a darkened steel trident", "a crimson-hafted battleaxe", "a polished onyx-inlaid shield", "a jeweled wristcuff", "an obsidian encrusted sungwood staff", "a wicked knife bladed axe", "a polearm with a serrated catchpole", "a wildly-spiked axe", }

Script.name: rents angreal
Script.script: rents.angreal = { "a disc of moonstone", "a greenish, translucent sphere", "a jade carving of an old man", "a many-faceted stone", "a necklace of fire sapphire", "a sculpted statuette", "a short, thick rod", "a small crystalline circlet", "a small crystalline globe", "a small stone dagger", "a wood carving of a bear", "an ivory figurine", "an orb filled with incandescent light", "a carved ivory pyramid", "Callandor", "a bracelet of twisted silver", }

Script.name: rents:parse_cost
Script.script:
function rents:str_to_coppers(cost) local COPPERS_PER_CROWN = 20
local crowns = cost:match("(%d+) gold crowns") local coppers = cost:match("(%d+) coppers") crowns = tonumber(crowns) or 0 coppers = tonumber(coppers) or 0 return crowns * COPPERS_PER_CROWN + coppers end
function rents:coppers_to_str(cost) local COPPERS_PER_CROWN = 20 local crowns = math.floor(cost / COPPERS_PER_CROWN) local coppers = cost % COPPERS_PER_CROWN
local res = f"{crowns}g {coppers}c" return res end

Script.name: rents:fit_to_width
Script.script: function rents:fit_to_width(s, width) local res if s:len() > width then res = f'{s:sub(1, width - 3)}...' else res = " " res = res:rep(width - s:len()) res = f'{s}{res}' end return res end

Script.name: rents:display_items
Script.script:
function rents:display_items(storage) cecho(string.format("%-10s<ansi_cyan>%-40s<reset>%s<green>%-40s<gold>%-10s\n", "Name", "Room", "", "Item", "Cost"))
for _, item in pairs(storage) do local crowns = item.cost:match("(%d+) gold crowns") local coppers = item.cost:match("(%d+) coppers") if crowns then crowns = f"{crowns}g" else crowns = "0g" end if coppers then coppers = f"{coppers}c" else coppers = "0c" end local cost = f"{crowns} {coppers}"
local room_name = ""
if item.room == 0 then room_name = "bank" else room_name = getRoomName(item.room) end
local msg_format = "%-10s%-40s%s%-40s%-10s\n"
if room_name:len() >= 40 or item.item:len() >= 40 then msg_format = "%-10s%-40s\n%10s%-80s%-10s\n" end
local msg = string.format(msg_format, item.name, room_name, "", item.item, cost ) cechoLink(msg, function() centerview(item.room) end, "Click to center map on room.", true) end end

Script.name: tmp_rent_viewer
Script.script:
rents = rents or {} rents.rares = rents.rares or {} rents.angreal = rents.angreal or {} RentViewer = RentViewer or {}
-- ============================================================ -- CONFIG -- ============================================================ RentViewer.windowName = "RentViewerWindow" RentViewer.width = 1200 RentViewer.height = 750
RentViewer.oddRowColor = {0, 0, 0} RentViewer.evenRowColor = {0, 0, 0} RentViewer.textColor = {185, 185, 185}
RentViewer.oddRowColor = {20, 20, 28} --RentViewer.evenRowColor = {30, 30, 42} --RentViewer.textColor = {220, 220, 220}
RentViewer.highlightColor = {128, 200, 255}
RentViewer.currentSortField = "name" RentViewer.sortAscending = true
local COLUMN_WIDTHS = { name = 19, location = 50, item = 50, cost = 12 } local COLUMN_GAP = 4
-- ============================================================ -- UTILITIES -- ============================================================ local function getCenteredCoordinates() local screenW, screenH = getMainWindowSize() local x = math.max(0, math.floor((screenW - RentViewer.width) / 2)) local y = math.max(0, math.floor((screenH - RentViewer.height) / 2)) return x, y end
-- ============================================================ -- DATA -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:fetchRecords() if not db then return self.sampleData or {} end
local rents_db = db:get_database("rents") if not rents_db or not rents_db.storage then return self.sampleData or {} end
local records = db:fetch(rents_db.storage) or {} for _, rec in ipairs(records) do if tostring(rec.item or ""):lower() == "bank balance" then rec.zone = "*Bank" rec.roomName = "" rec.location = "*Bank" else rec.roomName = getRoomName(rec.room) or "" rec.location = rec.zone .. ": " .. rec.roomName end rec.coppers = rents:str_to_coppers(rec.cost) end return records end
function RentViewer:getUniqueValues(field) local seen, list = {}, {} for _, rec in ipairs(self.cachedRecords or {}) do local v = rec[field] if v ~= nil and v ~= "" then v = tostring(v) if not seen[v] then seen[v] = true table.insert(list, v) end end end table.sort(list, function(a, b) local na, nb = tonumber(a), tonumber(b) if na and nb then return na < nb end return a < b end) return list end
function RentViewer:getZonesForName(nameFilter) local seen, list = {}, {} local filteredName = (nameFilter or ""):lower() for _, rec in ipairs(self.cachedRecords or {}) do local recName = tostring(rec.name or ""):lower() if filteredName == "" or recName == filteredName then local v = rec.zone if v ~= nil and v ~= "" then v = tostring(v) if not seen[v] then seen[v] = true table.insert(list, v) end end end end table.sort(list, function(a, b) local na, nb = tonumber(a), tonumber(b) if na and nb then return na < nb end return a < b end) return list end
-- ============================================================ -- DROPDOWN WIDGET -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:createDropdown(cfg) local dropdown = { value = "" } local parent = cfg.parent or self.window local optionH = 20
dropdown.label = Geyser.Label:new({ name = cfg.name .. "Label", x = cfg.x, y = cfg.y, width = cfg.width, height = cfg.height, }, parent) dropdown.label:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(30,30,40); border: 1px solid rgb(90,90,110); color: rgb(220,220,220); font-size: 11px; padding-left: 4px; border-radius: 4px; ]]) dropdown.label:echo("All")
dropdown.caret = Geyser.Label:new({ name = cfg.name .. "Caret", x = "-20px", y = 0, width = "20px", height = "100%", }, dropdown.label) dropdown.caret:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0); color: rgb(130,130,150); font-size: 9px;") dropdown.caret:echo("▼") dropdown.caret:setAlignment("center")
local options = {"All"} for _, v in ipairs(cfg.options or {}) do table.insert(options, v) end
dropdown.list = Geyser.Container:new({ name = cfg.name .. "List", x = cfg.x, y = cfg.y + cfg.height, width = cfg.width, height = math.min(optionH * #options, 300), }, parent) dropdown.list:hide()
for i, v in ipairs(options) do local opt = Geyser.Label:new({ name = cfg.name .. "Opt" .. i, x = 0, y = (i - 1) * optionH, width = cfg.width, height = optionH, }, dropdown.list) opt:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(40,40,55); color: rgb(220,220,220); font-size: 11px; padding-left: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(50,50,65); ]]) opt:echo(v) opt:setClickCallback(function() dropdown.value = (v == "All") and "" or v dropdown.label:echo(v) self:closeOpenDropdown() if cfg.onChange then cfg.onChange(dropdown.value) end self:refresh() end) end
local function toggleOpen() if self.openDropdown == dropdown then self:closeOpenDropdown() else self:closeOpenDropdown() dropdown.list:show() self.openDropdown = dropdown self.clickCatcher:show() self.clickCatcher:raiseAll() dropdown.list:raiseAll() end end
dropdown.label:setClickCallback(toggleOpen) dropdown.caret:setClickCallback(toggleOpen)
function dropdown:getText() return self.value end function dropdown:setText(v) self.value = v or "" self.label:echo((self.value == "") and "All" or self.value) end
return dropdown end
function RentViewer:closeOpenDropdown() if self.openDropdown then self.openDropdown.list:hide() self.openDropdown = nil end self.clickCatcher:hide() end
-- ============================================================ -- LOCATION DROPDOWN REBUILD -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:rebuildLocationDropdown(nameFilter) if self.inputLocation then if self.openDropdown == self.inputLocation then self:closeOpenDropdown() end self.inputLocation.label:hide() self.inputLocation.list:hide() end
self.inputLocation = self:createDropdown({ name = "RentViewerInputLocation", parent = self.window, x = self.locationDropdownX, y = self.locationDropdownY, width = self.locationDropdownW, height = self.locationDropdownH, options = self:getZonesForName(nameFilter), }) end
-- ============================================================ -- RESET FILTERS -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:resetFiltersAndSorting() self.inputOmni:print("") self.inputItem:print("") self.inputName:setText(rents.name or "") self.rareChecked = false self:_updateRareCheckbox() self.angrealChecked = false self:_updateAngrealCheckbox() self.summaryChecked = false self:_updateSummaryCheckbox() self:rebuildLocationDropdown("") self.currentSortField = "name" self.sortAscending = true end
-- ============================================================ -- UI CONSTRUCTION -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:buildUI() if self.window then self.window:hide() self.window = nil end
self.openDropdown = nil
local startX, startY = getCenteredCoordinates()
self.window = Adjustable.Container:new({ name = self.windowName, x = startX, y = startY, width = self.width, height = self.height, titleText = "Rents", titleTxtColor = "#ffffff", adjLabelstyle = "background-color: rgb(15,15,20); border: 2px solid rgb(90,90,110); border-radius: 4px;", buttonstyle = [[ QLabel { border-radius: 4px; background-color: rgba(140,140,140,100%);} QLabel::hover { background-color: rgba(160,160,160,50%);} ]], autoSave = false, autoLoad = false, hidden = true })
self.window:setTitle("Rents", "#ffffff", "9") self.window:resize(self.width, self.height) self.window:move(startX, startY)
function self.window:hide(...) Adjustable.Container.hide(self, ...) RentViewer:onHide() end
-- Click-catcher: dismisses open dropdowns on outside clicks self.clickCatcher = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerClickCatcher", x = 0, y = 0, width = "100%", height = "100%", }, self.window) self.clickCatcher:setStyleSheet("background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0);") self.clickCatcher:setClickCallback(function() self:closeOpenDropdown() end) self.clickCatcher:hide()
self:buildFilterBar() self:buildTableArea() end
function RentViewer:buildFilterBar() local lblH = 14 local inputH = 26 local lblGap = 2 local filterY = 20 local colGap = 8 local curX = 5
local labelY = filterY local inputY = filterY + lblH + lblGap
local lblStyle = "color: rgb(160,160,180); font-size: 10px; background: transparent; padding: 0px; font-size: 10px;" local inputStyle = "background-color: rgb(30,30,40); border: 1px solid rgb(90,90,110); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; padding: 2px 4px;" local omniW = 175 local nameW = 225 local locW = 225 local itemW = 175 local rareW = 55 local angrealW = 75 local summaryW = 85 local clearW = 65
-- ── Search All ─────────────────────────────────────────── local lblOmni = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerLblOmni", x = curX, y = labelY, width = omniW, height = lblH, }, self.window) lblOmni:setStyleSheet(lblStyle) lblOmni:echo("Search All")
self.inputOmni = Geyser.CommandLine:new({ name = "RentViewerInputOmni", x = curX, y = inputY, width = omniW, height = inputH, }, self.window) self.inputOmni:setStyleSheet(inputStyle) curX = curX + omniW + colGap
-- ── Name ───────────────────────────────────────────────── local lblName = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerLblName", x = curX, y = labelY, width = nameW, height = lblH, }, self.window) lblName:setStyleSheet(lblStyle) lblName:echo("Character")
self.inputName = self:createDropdown({ name = "RentViewerInputName", parent = self.window, x = curX, y = inputY, width = nameW, height = inputH, options = self:getUniqueValues("name"), onChange = function(selectedName) self:rebuildLocationDropdown(selectedName) end, }) curX = curX + nameW + colGap
-- ── Location ────────────────────────────────────────────── local lblLocation = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerLblLocation", x = curX, y = labelY, width = locW, height = lblH, }, self.window) lblLocation:setStyleSheet(lblStyle) lblLocation:echo("Location")
self.locationDropdownX = curX self.locationDropdownY = inputY self.locationDropdownW = locW self.locationDropdownH = inputH
self.inputLocation = self:createDropdown({ name = "RentViewerInputLocation", parent = self.window, x = curX, y = inputY, width = locW, height = inputH, options = self:getUniqueValues("zone"), }) curX = curX + locW + colGap
-- ── Item ────────────────────────────────────────────────── local lblItem = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerLblItem", x = curX, y = labelY, width = itemW, height = lblH, }, self.window) lblItem:setStyleSheet(lblStyle) lblItem:echo("Item")
self.inputItem = Geyser.CommandLine:new({ name = "RentViewerInputItem", x = curX, y = inputY, width = itemW, height = inputH, }, self.window) self.inputItem:setStyleSheet(inputStyle) curX = curX + itemW + colGap
-- ── Rare checkbox ───────────────────────────────────────── self.rareChecked = false self.chkRare = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerChkRare", x = curX, y = inputY, width = rareW, height = inputH, }, self.window) self:_updateRareCheckbox() self.chkRare:setClickCallback(function() self.rareChecked = not self.rareChecked if self.rareChecked then self.angrealChecked = false self:_updateAngrealCheckbox() end self:_updateRareCheckbox() self:refresh() end) curX = curX + rareW + colGap
-- ── Angreal checkbox ────────────────────────────────────── self.angrealChecked = false self.chkAngreal = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerChkAngreal", x = curX, y = inputY, width = angrealW, height = inputH, }, self.window) self:_updateAngrealCheckbox() self.chkAngreal:setClickCallback(function() self.angrealChecked = not self.angrealChecked if self.angrealChecked then self.rareChecked = false self:_updateRareCheckbox() end self:_updateAngrealCheckbox() self:refresh() end) curX = curX + angrealW + colGap
-- ── Summary toggle ──────────────────────────────────────── self.summaryChecked = false self.chkSummary = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerChkSummary", x = -clearW - summaryW - colGap - 5, y = inputY, width = summaryW, height = inputH, }, self.window) self:_updateSummaryCheckbox() self.chkSummary:setClickCallback(function() self.summaryChecked = not self.summaryChecked self:_updateSummaryCheckbox() self:refresh() end)
-- ── Reset button ────────────────────────────────────────── local btnClear = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerBtnClear", x = -clearW - 5, y = inputY, width = clearW, height = inputH, }, self.window) btnClear:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(80,60,30); border: 1px solid rgb(140,110,60); color: white; font-weight: bold; font-size: 11px; border-radius: 4px; ]]) btnClear:echo("Reset") btnClear:setAlignment("center") btnClear:setClickCallback(function() self:resetFiltersAndSorting() self:refresh() end) end
function RentViewer:_updateRareCheckbox() if self.rareChecked then self.chkRare:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(40,80,40); border: 1px solid rgb(80,160,80); color: rgb(120,255,120); font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkRare:echo("☑ Rare") else self.chkRare:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(30,30,40); border: 1px solid rgb(90,90,110); color: rgb(180,180,180); font-size: 11px; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkRare:echo("☐ Rare") end self.chkRare:setAlignment("center") end
function RentViewer:_updateAngrealCheckbox() if self.angrealChecked then self.chkAngreal:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(50,40,80); border: 1px solid rgb(120,80,200); color: rgb(190,140,255); font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkAngreal:echo("☑ Angreal") else self.chkAngreal:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(30,30,40); border: 1px solid rgb(90,90,110); color: rgb(180,180,180); font-size: 11px; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkAngreal:echo("☐ Angreal") end self.chkAngreal:setAlignment("center") end
function RentViewer:_updateSummaryCheckbox() if self.summaryChecked then self.chkSummary:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(40,55,75); border: 1px solid rgb(80,140,210); color: rgb(130,185,255); font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkSummary:echo("☑ Summary") else self.chkSummary:setStyleSheet([[ background-color: rgb(30,30,40); border: 1px solid rgb(90,90,110); color: rgb(180,180,180); font-size: 11px; border-radius: 4px; ]]) self.chkSummary:echo("☐ Summary") end self.chkSummary:setAlignment("center") end
function RentViewer:buildTableArea() local filterY = 20 local filterH = 42 local tableTop = filterY + filterH + 12 local headerH = 25 local countH = 16
self.tableContainer = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "RentViewerTableContainer", x = 5, y = tableTop, width = "-5px", height = "-" .. (countH + 4) .. "px", }, self.window)
self.headerContainer = Geyser.Container:new({ name = "RentViewerHeaderContainer", x = 0, y = 0, width = "100%", height = headerH, }, self.tableContainer)
self.console = Geyser.MiniConsole:new({ name = "RentViewerConsole", x = 0, y = headerH + 2, width = "100%", height = "-5px", }, self.tableContainer) self.console:setColor("black") self.console:setFont("Courier New") self.console:setFontSize(10) self.console:enableScrolling() self.console:enableScrollBar()
self.lblCount = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentViewerLblCount", x = -305, y = "-" .. (countH + 1) .. "px", width = 300, height = countH, }, self.window) self.lblCount:setStyleSheet("background-color: transparent; color: rgb(180,180,180); font-size: 11px;")
self:buildColumnHeaders() end
function RentViewer:buildColumnHeaders() local charW = calcFontSize(10, "Courier New") if not charW or charW <= 0 then charW = 8 end
local CONSOLE_INDENT_PX = charW - 3
local columns = { { field = "name", label = "Character", widthChars = COLUMN_WIDTHS.name }, { field = "location", label = "Location", widthChars = COLUMN_WIDTHS.location }, { field = "item", label = "Item", widthChars = COLUMN_WIDTHS.item }, { field = "cost", label = "Amount", widthChars = COLUMN_WIDTHS.cost }, }
self.headers = {} local charOffset = 0
for i, col in ipairs(columns) do local labelX = (i == 1) and 0 or (CONSOLE_INDENT_PX + charOffset * charW) local labelWidth
if i < #columns then local nextColX = CONSOLE_INDENT_PX + (charOffset + col.widthChars + COLUMN_GAP) * charW labelWidth = nextColX - labelX - 3 else labelWidth = self.headerContainer:get_width() - labelX end
local lbl = Geyser.Label:new({ name = "RentHeader_" .. col.field, x = labelX, y = 0, width = labelWidth, height = "100%", }, self.headerContainer)
lbl:setClickCallback(function() if self.currentSortField == col.field then self.sortAscending = not self.sortAscending else self.currentSortField = col.field self.sortAscending = true end self:refresh() end)
self.headers[col.field] = { widget = lbl, label = col.label, indent = (i == 1) and CONSOLE_INDENT_PX or 0, }
charOffset = charOffset + col.widthChars + COLUMN_GAP end end
function RentViewer:startLiveTimer() self.lastItemText = self.inputItem:getText() or "" self.lastOmniText = self.inputOmni:getText() or "" if self.liveTimer then killTimer(self.liveTimer) end self.liveTimer = tempTimer(0.3, function() if not self.window then return end local okItem, itemText = pcall(function() return self.inputItem:getText() end) local okOmni, omniText = pcall(function() return self.inputOmni:getText() end) itemText = okItem and itemText or self.lastItemText omniText = okOmni and omniText or self.lastOmniText if itemText ~= self.lastItemText or omniText ~= self.lastOmniText then self.lastItemText = itemText self.lastOmniText = omniText self:refresh() end
if self.window.width ~= self.width .. "px" then cecho(self.window.width)
--cecho(self.window.width.. " " .. self.window.height .."\n") self.window:resize(self.width, self.window.height) --cecho("resized") end end, true) end
-- ============================================================ -- RENDERING HELPERS -- ============================================================ local function renderHighlightedCellold(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) local fitted = rents:fit_to_width(text, width)
if matchTerm and matchTerm ~= "" then local lowerFitted = fitted:lower() local lowerTerm = matchTerm:lower() local startIdx, endIdx = lowerFitted:find(lowerTerm, 1, true) if startIdx then if startIdx > 1 then console:setFgColor(textColor[1], textColor[2], textColor[3]) console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(fitted:sub(1, startIdx - 1)) end console:setFgColor(highlightColor[1], highlightColor[2], highlightColor[3]) console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(fitted:sub(startIdx, endIdx)) if endIdx < #fitted then console:setFgColor(textColor[1], textColor[2], textColor[3]) console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(fitted:sub(endIdx + 1)) end return end end
console:setFgColor(textColor[1], textColor[2], textColor[3]) console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(fitted) end
local function buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) local fitted = rents:fit_to_width(text, width)
local function tag(fg, background) return string.format("<%d,%d,%d:%d,%d,%d>", fg[1], fg[2], fg[3], background[1], background[2], background[3]) end
if matchTerm and matchTerm ~= "" then local lowerFitted = fitted:lower() local lowerTerm = matchTerm:lower() local startIdx, endIdx = lowerFitted:find(lowerTerm, 1, true) if startIdx then local s = "" if startIdx > 1 then s = s .. tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(1, startIdx - 1) end s = s .. tag(highlightColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(startIdx, endIdx) if endIdx < #fitted then s = s .. tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted:sub(endIdx + 1) end return s end end return tag(textColor, bg) .. fitted end
local function renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) console:decho(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg)) end
local function renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, command, hint) console:dechoLink(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg), command, hint, true) end
local function renderHighlightedPopup(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, actions, hints) console:dechoPopup(buildHighlightedText(text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg), actions, hints, true) end
local function renderHeaders(self) local stylesheetTemplate = [[ background-color: rgb(45, 45, 60); border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(90, 90, 115); color: %s; font-family: 'Courier New'; font-size: 11px; font-weight: %s; padding-left: %dpx; ]]
for field, header in pairs(self.headers) do local isActive = (self.currentSortField == field) local color = isActive and "rgb(255, 215, 0)" or "rgb(185, 185, 185)" local weight = isActive and "bold" or "normal"
local displayLabel if self.summaryChecked and field == "item" then displayLabel = "Item Count" elseif self.summaryChecked and field == "cost" then displayLabel = "Sum Amount" else displayLabel = header.label end
local text = displayLabel .. (isActive and (self.sortAscending and " ▲" or " ▼") or "")
header.widget:setStyleSheet(stylesheetTemplate:format(color, weight, header.indent)) header.widget:echo(text) end end
-- ============================================================ -- FILTER + REFRESH -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:getActiveFilters() return { omni = (self.inputOmni:getText() or ""):lower(), item = (self.inputItem:getText() or ""):lower(), location = (self.inputLocation:getText() or ""):lower(), name = (self.inputName:getText() or ""):lower(), rareOnly = self.rareChecked or false, angrealOnly = self.angrealChecked or false, } end
function RentViewer:filterRecords(filters) local records = {}
for _, rec in ipairs(self.cachedRecords or {}) do local name = tostring(rec.name or "") local location = rec.location or "" local item = tostring(rec.item or "")
local matchOmni = filters.omni == "" or item:lower():find(filters.omni, 1, true) or name:lower():find(filters.omni, 1, true) or location:lower():find(filters.omni, 1, true)
local matchItem = filters.item == "" or item:lower():find(filters.item, 1, true) local matchLocation = filters.location == "" or location:lower():find(filters.location, 1, true) local matchName = filters.name == "" or name:lower():find(filters.name, 1, true)
local matchRare = true if filters.rareOnly then matchRare = false local itemLower = item:lower() if #rents.rares > 0 then for _, rareName in ipairs(rents.rares) do if itemLower:find(rareName:lower(), 1, true) then matchRare = true break end end end end
local matchAngreal = true if filters.angrealOnly then matchAngreal = false local itemLower = item:lower() if #rents.angreal > 0 then for _, angrealName in ipairs(rents.angreal) do if itemLower:find(angrealName:lower(), 1, true) then matchAngreal = true break end end end end
if matchOmni and matchItem and matchLocation and matchName and matchRare and matchAngreal then table.insert(records, { name = name, room = rec.room or 0, location = location, item = item, coppers = rec.coppers or 0 }) end end
return records end
function RentViewer:sortRecords(records) local sortField = self.currentSortField local ascending = self.sortAscending
table.sort(records, function(a, b) local function cmp_asc(valA, valB, fallback) if valA ~= valB then return valA < valB end return fallback() end
local function cmp_primary(valA, valB, fallback) if valA ~= valB then if ascending then return valA < valB else return valA > valB end end return fallback() end
local name = function(x) return x.name:lower() end local loc = function(x) return x.location:lower() end local item = function(x) return x.item:lower() end local cost = function(x) return x.coppers end
if sortField == "name" then return cmp_primary(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cmp_asc(item(a), item(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) elseif sortField == "location" then return cmp_primary(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(item(a), item(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) elseif sortField == "item" then return cmp_primary(item(a), item(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) else -- cost return cmp_primary(cost(a), cost(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return item(a) < item(b) end) end) end) end end) end
function RentViewer:sortSummaryGroups(groups) local sortField = self.currentSortField local ascending = self.sortAscending
table.sort(groups, function(a, b) local function cmp_asc(valA, valB, fallback) if valA ~= valB then return valA < valB end return fallback() end
local function cmp_primary(valA, valB, fallback) if valA ~= valB then if ascending then return valA < valB else return valA > valB end end return fallback() end
local name = function(x) return x.name:lower() end local loc = function(x) return x.location:lower() end local item = function(x) return x.count end local cost = function(x) return x.totalCost end
if sortField == "name" then return cmp_primary(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cmp_asc(item(a), item(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) elseif sortField == "location" then return cmp_primary(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(item(a), item(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) elseif sortField == "item" then return cmp_primary(item(a), item(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return cost(a) < cost(b) end) end) end) else -- cost return cmp_primary(cost(a), cost(b), function() return cmp_asc(name(a), name(b), function() return cmp_asc(loc(a), loc(b), function() return item(a) < item(b) end) end) end) end end) end
function RentViewer:refresh() renderHeaders(self)
local filters = self:getActiveFilters() local records = self:filterRecords(filters)
local console = self.console local textColor = self.textColor local highlightColor = self.highlightColor local gapStr = string.rep(" ", COLUMN_GAP) console:clear()
local function activeMatchFor(colText, specificFilter) if specificFilter ~= "" then return specificFilter end if filters.omni ~= "" and colText:lower():find(filters.omni, 1, true) then return filters.omni end return "" end
-- ── Summary mode ────────────────────────────────────────── if self.summaryChecked then local groups = {} local keyOrder = {}
for _, rec in ipairs(records) do local key = rec.name .. "\0" .. rec.location if not groups[key] then groups[key] = { name = rec.name, location = rec.location, room = rec.room, count = 0, totalCost = 0, isBank = (rec.location == "*Bank"), items = {}, } table.insert(keyOrder, key) end if not groups[key].isBank then groups[key].count = groups[key].count + 1 table.insert(groups[key].items, { name = rec.item, coppers = rec.coppers }) end groups[key].totalCost = groups[key].totalCost + rec.coppers end
local sorted = {} for _, k in ipairs(keyOrder) do table.insert(sorted, groups[k]) end
self:sortSummaryGroups(sorted)
local rowToggle = false for _, grp in ipairs(sorted) do rowToggle = not rowToggle local bg = rowToggle and self.oddRowColor or self.evenRowColor
local function cell(text, width, matchTerm) renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) end local function link(text, width, matchTerm, command, hint) renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, command, hint) end local function popup(text, width, matchTerm, actions, hints) renderHighlightedPopup(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, actions, hints) end local function gap() console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(gapStr) end
console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(" ")
cell(grp.name, COLUMN_WIDTHS.name, activeMatchFor(grp.name, filters.name)) gap()
if grp.room and grp.room > 0 then link(grp.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(grp.location, filters.location), function() centerview(grp.room) end, "Click to center map on room.") else cell(grp.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(grp.location, filters.location)) end gap()
-- ── Item count cell ──────────────────────────────────── local itemText = grp.isBank and "bank balance" or (grp.count == 1 and "1 item" or grp.count .. " items") if grp.isBank or #grp.items == 0 then cell(itemText, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, activeMatchFor(itemText, filters.location)) else local hints = {} local actions = {} for _, itm in ipairs(grp.items) do local costStr = rents:coppers_to_str(itm.coppers) table.insert(hints, " " .. itm.name .. " | " .. costStr .. " ") table.insert(actions, "") end popup(itemText, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, "", actions, hints) end gap()
local costStr = rents:coppers_to_str(grp.totalCost) cell(costStr, COLUMN_WIDTHS.cost, "")
console:setFgColor(255, 255, 255) console:setBgColor(0, 0, 0) console:echo("\n") console:resetFormat() end
if #sorted == 0 then console:setFgColor(150, 150, 150) console:setBgColor(0, 0, 0) console:echo(" No matching results.\n") end
self.lblCount:cecho("<p style='text-align: right'><gray>" .. string.format(#sorted == 1 and "%d result" or "%d results", #sorted))
console:scrollTo(console:getLineCount()) return end
-- ── Individual record mode (default) ────────────────────── self:sortRecords(records) local count = #records
local rowToggle = false for _, rec in ipairs(records) do rowToggle = not rowToggle local bg = rowToggle and self.oddRowColor or self.evenRowColor
local function cell(text, width, matchTerm) renderHighlightedCell(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg) end local function link(text, width, matchTerm, command, hint) renderHighlightedLink(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, command, hint) end local function popup(text, width, matchTerm, actions, hints) renderHighlightedPopup(console, text, width, matchTerm, textColor, highlightColor, bg, actions, hints) end local function gap() console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(gapStr) end
console:setBgColor(bg[1], bg[2], bg[3]) console:echo(" ")
cell(rec.name, COLUMN_WIDTHS.name, activeMatchFor(rec.name, filters.name)) gap()
if rec.room and rec.room > 0 then link(rec.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(rec.location, filters.location), function() centerview(rec.room) end, "Click to center map on room.") else cell(rec.location, COLUMN_WIDTHS.location, activeMatchFor(rec.location, filters.location)) end gap()
cell(rec.item, COLUMN_WIDTHS.item, activeMatchFor(rec.item, filters.item)) gap()
local costStr = rents:coppers_to_str(rec.coppers) cell(costStr, COLUMN_WIDTHS.cost, "")
console:setFgColor(255, 255, 255) console:setBgColor(0, 0, 0) console:echo("\n") console:resetFormat() end
if count == 0 then console:setFgColor(150, 150, 150) console:setBgColor(0, 0, 0) console:echo(" No matching results.\n") end
self.lblCount:cecho("<p style='text-align: right'><gray>" .. string.format(count == 1 and "%d result" or "%d results", count))
console:scrollTo(console:getLineCount()) end
-- ============================================================ -- SHOW / HIDE -- ============================================================ function RentViewer:show() self.cachedRecords = self:fetchRecords()
if not self.window then self:buildUI() end
self:closeOpenDropdown() self:resetFiltersAndSorting() self:refresh() self:startLiveTimer()
local cx, cy = getCenteredCoordinates() self.window:move(cx, cy) self.window:show() end
function RentViewer:hide() if self.window then self.window:hide() end end
function RentViewer:onHide() if self.liveTimer then killTimer(self.liveTimer) self.liveTimer = nil end self.cachedRecords = nil end
function RentViewer:rebuild() self.window = nil self:show() end
